---
title: "User Guide"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; padding:5rem 2rem; color:#888;">
  <div style="font-size:3rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">📖</div>
  <h2 style="color:#555;">Coming Soon</h2>
  <p>The Shiny app user guide will be published here once the application is deployed.</p>
  <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#aaa;">Due: 5 July 2026</p>
</div>
```
